data.name: Love Sucks: Night Two
data.detailed_description:
💘CHECK THIS OUT!💘


關於此遊戲

Night One is included in full in Night Two, so you don't have to play that one first!



This is Love Sucks:Night Two, the second part in your mission to get laid and not die doing it. When sexy monsters are out to kill you for their own mysterious goals, it's date or die! You've survived the first night, but can you survive your second, and maybe learn a little bit more about the strange new world of monsters and magic you've found yourself mixed up in? Together with your deadly dates, explore the famous Witching Woods Carnival, hosted in Mooncroft Park. Visit the attractions, win some prizes, get to know your dates, bang them a few times, and maybe even die a few times accidentally and on purpose to really make the most of it! What fun!

Love Sucks is an adult Visual Novel, in which monster-kind has secretly integrated with humanity. Two monster girls, a vampire and a succubus have chosen you to be their date this Halloween! But their motives go beyond just showing you a good time... With the involvement of magical artifacts, monster police, a mysterious death-based time-travelling enchantment, big boobs and a sweet rump, can you survive long enough to save not only yourself, but the monsters too?

Or maybe you'll just let it happen over, and over, because, screw it, the succ is good and there's worse ways to go!

data.short_description: This is Love Sucks:Night Two, the second part in your mission to get laid and not die doing it. When sexy monsters are out to kill you for their own mysterious goals, it's date or die! You've survived the first night, but can you survive your second?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Better than a Smart fridge
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Even integrated would probably work
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Ideally you should have one

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher, 64-bit
  • Processor: Better than a Smart fridge
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Even integrated would probably work
  • Storage: 800 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Ideally you should have one

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.10+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 800 MB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 800 MB available space
